title: Animal Cosmetics
description: Adds Animal Cosmetics to the Custom Cosmetics Mod!
body:
# Animal Cosmetics  
This resourcepack currently adds 8 adorable animal themed backpacks, and a couple Capes/Elytras to Custom Cosmetics!  
Included inside is the configdata file you need to copy into your server-config file  
located at gamedir/core/cosmetics!
## What To Expect  
![Fox Backpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/906cb885548163bf412ecb234e583d249e722401.png)
![Frog Backpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73ab5fdc830133a5a478243490f8af1bbce05f3d.png)  
Check out the Gallery for all currently added cosmetics!  
## How To Use  
Server owners/Modpack Devs/Single-Player Enjoyers please run the `/cosmeticsadmin inject all` command to automatically inject the configdata into your server-config file!  

_Ensure you use the correct resourcepack for the mod version_
## More To Come  
This resourcepack will continue to get updated to add various other animals to more than just the backpacks model!
